title: stachys heraclea
intro: Stachys heraclea, also known as Greek hyssop or giant hyssop, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate colds, sore throats, and other infections.
